nasb.text: And being in agony He was praying very fervently; and His sweat became like drops of blood, falling down upon the ground.

esv.text: And being in agony he prayed more earnestly; and his sweat became like great drops of blood falling down to the ground.

ccb.text: 祂心中极其悲痛，祷告更恳切，汗珠如血滴在地上。

csbs.text: 耶稣在极大的痛苦中，祷告更加恳切；他的汗珠变得像大血滴，落在地上。
